creator: mharo@FreeBSD.org
text:
man ldd says:
           find . -type f | xargs -n1 file -F   | grep ELF | cut -f1 -d' ' |
           xargs ldd -f '%A %o\n' | grep libc.so.6

Fix: 

find . -type f | xargs -n1 file -F  ' ' | grep ELF | cut -f1 -d' ' |
	(add the single quotes after -F)
How-To-Repeat: 	man ldd
